prestazioni: Engine swap to a **EN07X** (supercharged 660cc kei-car engine) with a **HKS GT-SS Supercharger Kit** (8 psi boost, 120+ hp) paired with a **Tomei 264° camshaft** (intake/exhaust) and **Ferrea Racing Valves** (titanium retainers, 1mm oversized) for high-RPM stability.

Full **Tommy Kaira R2-Spec Drivetrain Upgrade**: **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** (1.5-way, 85% lock rate) with **PPG close-ratio 5-speed gearset** (1st: 3.083, 2nd: 1.866, 3rd: 1.310, 4th: 1.000, 5th: 0.825) and **Nismo carbon-fiber driveshaft** to handle increased torque.

Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins Road & Track DFV Coilovers** (30-way damping, 20mm adjustable ride height) + **Cusco Type-RS 22mm front sway bar** and **Beatrush rear strut bar** (aluminum, 3-point design) for kei-car-specific chassis reinforcement.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB-R2 Widebody Kit** (carbon fiber, 50mm extended fenders, custom rear diffuser) with **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (2-element, 1,200mm span, 3D-printed aluminum mounts) for aggressive stance and downforce.

**Recaro Sportster CS-II Kei-Car Edition** (alcantara/leather, 6-point harness compatibility) + **Sparco Pro 2000 steering wheel** (320mm, suede, quick-release hub) with **Defi BF Advance Kei-Spec Gauges** (oil temp, boost, AFR, 52mm pods).

**Work Emotion CR Kiwami** wheels (15x6.5 +38 offset, 4x100 PCD) wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** (185/55R15, semi-slick compound) with **Project Mu B-Spec 4-pot calipers** (256mm rotors, radial-mount) and **Endless CC-RX brake pads**.
